name: sonata
description: Token-efficient agent harness starter for generating project skeletons with local skills and repo knowledge.

scripts.smoke:init:
rm -rf .tmp-sonata-smoke .tmp-sonata-all .tmp-sonata-retrofit && node bin/sonata.js init .tmp-sonata-smoke --yes --description "Smoke test project" --kind "generic app" --stack "Node" --milestone "Validate generated harness" && bash .tmp-sonata-smoke/scripts/check-sonata.sh && test -f .tmp-sonata-smoke/.codex/prompts/retrofit-sonata.md && test -f .tmp-sonata-smoke/.github/skills/retrofit-sonata/SKILL.md && node bin/sonata.js init .tmp-sonata-all --yes --agents all --description "All-agent smoke project" --kind "generic app" --stack "Node" --milestone "Validate all agent files" && bash .tmp-sonata-all/scripts/check-sonata.sh && test -f .tmp-sonata-all/.github/copilot-instructions.md && test -f .tmp-sonata-all/CLAUDE.md && test -f .tmp-sonata-all/.claude/skills/retrofit-sonata/SKILL.md && mkdir .tmp-sonata-retrofit && printf 'existing readme
' > .tmp-sonata-retrofit/README.md && cd .tmp-sonata-retrofit && node ../bin/sonata.js retrofit --yes && grep -q 'existing readme' README.md && bash scripts/check-sonata.sh && cd .. && rm -rf .tmp-sonata-smoke .tmp-sonata-all .tmp-sonata-retrofit
